title: Snapshot
description: Immutable checkpoint of workspace state for rollback capability.

snapshot_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: snap-{12 hex chars from uuid4}.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must end with Z.

reason.description: Why this snapshot was created (e.g., 'before skill bank mutation').

manifest.description: Complete copy of manifest.json at snapshot time.

skill_bank.description: Complete copy of skill_bank.json at snapshot time.
